commit_recommendation.git_commit: git commit -m 'record spec history for ISSUE-91C'
commit_recommendation.message: It is recommended to commit this history directory now: specs/.history/issue-91-force-scripts-cli-dep-cleanup/ticket-002-ISSUE-91C

history_policy: append-only by convention; existing entries are not overwritten and filesystem permissions remain git-friendly
summary: Closed ISSUE-91C after adding E2E force-sync graph coverage for skill-script plus MCP and plugin CLI/MCP/script dependency sets.

assertions: skill.script.force.sync.with.mcp proves sync --force-scripts reruns a skill-script dep while MCP sync still runs.
plugin.skill_script.force.sync proves plugin sync --force-scripts reruns a plugin-level skill-script dep while plugin CLI and MCP deps remain valid.
Test graph nodes are recorded as evidence for SyncUnitForceScripts, not as new TLA+ actions.

adapters: Graph evidence covers a skill with skill-script plus MCP deps.
Graph evidence covers a plugin with pip CLI, MCP, and skill-script deps.
graph_after_unit_pass: Add smoke coverage where a skill has both skill-script CLI and MCP deps, noop sync skips, and sync --force-scripts reruns the script.
Add plugin-smoke coverage where a plugin has pip CLI, MCP, and skill-script deps, noop sync skips, and sync --force-scripts reruns the script.
Run broad graph coverage after TLC and unit tests pass.
model_actions: SyncUnitForceScripts evidence expanded across richer dependency sets.
model_state: No TLA+ semantic changes; graph nodes are evidence for SyncUnitForceScripts.
unit_tests: Spec workflow tests assert graph evidence is recorded outside the TLA+ model.

ticket.objective: Add end-to-end force-sync coverage for richer skill/plugin dependency sets so the command path proves noop sync skips and sync --force-scripts reruns skill-script deps while MCP and package CLI side effects remain valid.
ticket.title: Add E2E force-sync graph coverage
